name: Aam Panna
tagline: Raw mango cooler with cumin and mint — heat-stroke remedy

hero.alt: Murky-green raw mango drink in a tall glass with mint leaves
hero.caption: aam panna — green mango, mint, cumin

steps.title: Boil the raw mango
steps.detail: Pressure cook the whole raw mangoes with 1 cup water for 3 whistles. Cool, peel, and squeeze the pulp off the seed.
steps.tip: Roasting gives a smokier aam panna; boiling keeps it bright.

steps.title: Blend with seasonings
steps.detail: Blend the pulp with jaggery, roasted cumin, black salt, and 1 cup water until smooth.

healthFacts: Raw mango is exceptionally high in vitamin C — supports immunity and iron absorption.
Roasted cumin adds digestive enzymes; useful post-meal.
